---
title: "Marine Mammal Passive Acoustic Monitoring, NWFSC"
subtitle: "Lab manual"
page-layout: full
---



::::: columns
::: {.column width="60%"}
The [Marine Mammal Ecology Team](https://www.fisheries.noaa.gov/west-coast/science-data/marine-mammal-ecology-pacific-northwest) conducts research using passive acoustic monitoring to support NOAA's management needs. We are part of the Conservation Biology Division at [NOAA's Northwest Fisheries Science Center](https://www.fisheries.noaa.gov/about/northwest-fisheries-science-center) in Seattle, Washington.

This lab manual serves as the handbook for the information to support our science.
:::

::: {.column width="40%"}
![Examples of different passive acoustic platforms used by NOAA](content/images/Shimada_whales.jpg){fig-alt="" fig-align="center"}
:::
:::::

## Team Members

[Shannon Rankin](https://www.fisheries.noaa.gov/contact/shannon-rankin), SAEL Team Leader

[Cory Hom-Weaver](https://www.fisheries.noaa.gov/contact/cory-hom-weaver), Acoustician and Fieldwork Manager

[Kourtney Burger](https://www.fisheries.noaa.gov/contact/kourtney-burger), Acoustician and Data Manager

## Other SAEL Repositories

See our [GitHub Repos page](https://sael-swfsc.github.io/SAEL-lab-manual/content/Data-Github.html) for links to all of our lab's individual repositories

## Location

**Shipping Address:** DOC/NOAA - SWFSC, 8901 La Jolla Shores Drive, La Jolla, CA 92037

## Additional NMFS PAM Lab Manuals

-   [PIFSC: Pacific Islands Fisheries](https://pifsc-protected-species-division.github.io/CRP_PAM_Manual/)

-   [NWFSC: Northwest Fisheries](https://noaa-nwfsc.github.io/NWFSC-PAM-Lab-Manual/){target="_blank"}

-   [AFSC: Alaska Fisheries](https://noaa-afsc.github.io/AFSC-MML-PAM-Lab-Manual/){target="_blank"}

-   [SEFSC: Southeast Fisheries](https://sefsc.github.io/SEFSC-PAM-Lab-Manual/){target="_blank"}

-   [NEFSC: Northeast Fisheries](https://nefsc.github.io/NEFSC_PAB_lab_manual/){target="_blank"}

-   [National PAM Network](https://nmfs-ost.github.io/PAM_National_Network/){target="_blank"}
